items.title: How the Narrative Surrounding Amex Is Evolving After Guidance Updates and Mixed Analyst Reactions
items.description: American Express has seen a subtle but important reset in its fair value narrative, with the price target edging up from about $351.87 to roughly $354.83 per share as analysts factor in slightly lower perceived risk and a steady long term revenue growth outlook near 10.28%. This modest uplift reflects a market that remains cautiously optimistic, balancing stronger billings trends and an improving sector backdrop against lingering questions on execution into 2026. Stay tuned to see how you can...
